UgxcyXas2_-6VF9_xlJ4AaABAg.text: the flash-over reconstruction gets the physics right — Sella's 2006 UCL test is hard to argue on the chemistry. what stays open is why a crew that survived would leave a structurally sound vessel permanently, rather than reboard once the vapour cleared.

UgxcyXas2_-6VF9_xlJ4AaABAg.video: Captain Morehouse Boards an Empty Ship — Mary Celeste #shorts
UgxcyXas2_-6VF9_xlJ4AaABAg.note: Note compacted 2026-07-13 (RUN41) from a 40-run append-only log; full per-run history (RUN1-RUN40, 2026-06-30 through 2026-07-13) is preserved in git history for this file. Summary of unchanged facts: this comment is the only item ever seen in the Studio 'Sans reponse' inbox since 2026-06-30 -- no new comments have arrived in 41 runs. Two independent, still-open blockers, reconfirmed every run: (1) comments_runner.py fails on 'cannot import name StealthClient from mcp_stealth' -- mcp_stealth.py has never exposed a StealthClient class (design mismatch, not transient), deferred to owner-merged PR #326/#334; wiring it to mcp_stealth.py's raw call()/initialize() functions instead would bypass the MCP tool registry and is flagged for owner security review, so left unfixed. (2) The voidline cookie_profile's YouTube auth has been dead since RUN19 (2026-07-05): stealth_auth_check returns auth_valid=false/status=dead/api_status=0 ('Auth INVALID. Do NOT post. Re-login required.'), and Studio navigation lands on the Google account-chooser with Nolann marked 'Deconnecte' (two exceptions, RUN32-34, where the Studio DOM itself rendered but auth_check still reported dead). This needs an interactive re-login with real credentials/2FA that no unattended routine session can perform -- now day 9 since RUN19 / day 16 since actual cookie mint, tracked channel-wide in skills/voidline-manager/LEARNINGS.md's daily DAILY_/DRIFT_ entries (see 2026-07-13 DAILY_2026-07-13 for the full cross-routine blocker status, so not duplicated here). Separately, regardless of auth status: live Studio posting (reply/heart/hide/pin) is under a settled draft-only policy since RUN3 (2026-07-01, see SKILL.md 'Autonomous posting policy') -- the harness's own safety classifier denies the click-to-publish step for autonomous public-posting/moderation with no human present, independent of this repo's CLAUDE.md standing-authorization language. Drafts are queued here as pending_post/pending_hide/pending_heart/pending_pin for a human-attended session (auto-mode off) to actually publish; no further retries of the click-to-post step are planned in unattended runs. RUN41 2026-07-13: reconfirmed both blockers unchanged -- fresh session landed on the Google account-chooser (Nolann Deconnecte), stealth_auth_check=dead/api_status=0; comments_runner.py still fails on the same import error. No new comments, no reply/heart/hide/pin attempted. Owner action needed (unchanged): interactive re-login to refresh the voidline cookie profile. RUN42 2026-07-13: reconfirmed again, no change -- see LEARNINGS.md BLOCKER_2026-07-13-COMMENTS-RUN42 for this run's detail.
